ui.pageIntro: Five small eggs from Maundy Thursday through Easter Monday.
ui.footerText: Built as a simple GitHub Pages version with no dependencies.
ui.basketIntro: Each egg opens on the right date. Opened eggs remain as cracked shells in the basket.
ui.galleryIntro: Each day, the new image is added to the gallery.

maundyThursday.title: Maundy Thursday
maundyThursday.body: Today's opening now appears in the gallery. You can replace the placeholder image with your own file in the bilder folder and keep the same file name if you want to avoid code changes.

goodFriday.title: Good Friday
goodFriday.body: This version is built for low friction: one egg, one image, one text. You can fill in more personal content later without changing the structure.

holySaturday.title: Holy Saturday
holySaturday.body: When an egg is opened, the shell stays in the basket and the image is collected separately in the gallery. That gives the page a clearer sense of daily progression.

easterSunday.title: Easter Sunday
easterSunday.body: Here you can add a finished artwork, an illustration, or a scanned image. The layout works especially well with portrait-oriented pictures.

easterMonday.title: Easter Monday
easterMonday.body: This is the final egg in the light version. Change text and images freely, but keeping the same structure makes the GitHub Pages setup easy to maintain.
